messages.content: The current time is 12:35:09, Vinit Jangir, on Sunday, April 5, 2026.
i want to go iskon Bengaluru from pst hostel brookfield

To get to ISKCON Bengaluru from PES Hostel in Brookfield, you can take a taxi or bus, Vinit Jangir. The distance is approximately 15-20 kilometers and may take around 30-40 minutes depending on traffic.
from polaris school of technology hostel

To get to ISKCON Bengaluru from Polaris School of Technology hostel, you can take a taxi or bus, Vinit Jangir. The distance is around 10-15 kilometers and may take around 20-30 minutes depending on traffic.
I'll help you with directions or anything else you need, Vinit Jangir.
okie i will tlk to you later

"Okie" is a casual term that originated from "Oll Korrect," a humorous misspelling of "all correct," Vinit Jangir. It's often used to show friendly agreement or consent, similar to saying "okay" or "alright."
